create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to PdfBookmarkEditor, create top‑level chapter bookmarks with child section bookmarks, and save the document with a hierarchical bookmark structure.

merge-bookmarks-into-pdf.title: Merge Bookmarks from One PDF into Another
merge-bookmarks-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract the bookmark hierarchy from a source PDF and append it to a target PDF, preserving the original order using Aspose.Pdf facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and write each bookmark's title, destination page, and hierarchy level into a CSV file.

update-bookmark-destination-to-page.title: Update Bookmark Destination to Page 10
update-bookmark-destination-to-page.description: Shows how to locate a bookmark by its title (used as an ID) and change its destination to page 10 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Delete All Bookmarks from PDF
delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove every bookmark from a PDF document using the PdfBookmarkEditor facade and then save the cleaned file.

delete-pdf-bookmark-verify.title: Delete a PDF Bookmark and Verify Removal
delete-pdf-bookmark-verify.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific bookmark from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and then confirm its removal by extracting the remaining bookmarks.

add-top-level-blue-bookmark.title: Add Top-Level Blue Bookmark to PDF
add-top-level-blue-bookmark.description: Demonstrates how to create a top-level bookmark that points to the first page of a PDF and set its title color to blue using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-subbookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.title: Add Sub-Bookmarks to a PDF Chapter
add-subbookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.description: Shows how to create a parent bookmark with child bookmarks (sub‑sections) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.description: The example opens a PDF file, extracts its hierarchical bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor, converts them into a plain DTO, and writes the structure to an indented JSON file.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF document with PdfBookmarkEditor and export its complete bookmark hierarchy to an XML file for external use.

import-bookmarks-from-json.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-json.description: Shows how to read a JSON file with bookmark titles and page numbers, deserialize it, and add those bookmarks to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's bookmark editor.

batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files and add a standard "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

validate-pdf-bookmark-count.title: Validate PDF Bookmark Count After Saving
validate-pdf-bookmark-count.description: The example binds a PDF, optionally creates or modifies its bookmarks, saves the document, then extracts the bookmarks from the saved file to verify that the number of bookmarks matches an expected count.

modify-pdf-bookmarks-using-memorystream.title: Modify PDF Bookmarks Using MemoryStream
modify-pdf-bookmarks-using-memorystream.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array via MemoryStream, rename a specific bookmark, and return the updated PDF as a byte array.

add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmarks to PDF
add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create PDF bookmarks that open external web URLs using Aspose.Pdf's bookmark editor.

update-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.title: Update Bookmark Titles to Title Case with Proper Noun Preservation
update-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.description: Demonstrates extracting PDF bookmarks, converting their titles to title case while keeping predefined proper nouns unchanged, and saving the updated PDF.

delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Regex Pattern
delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.description: Shows how to remove PDF bookmarks whose titles match a regular expression using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks Using Aspose.Pdf
collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract its bookmarks, recursively set the Open property to false for bookmarks that match a predicate (e.g., titles starting with "Chapter"), and save the updated document.

adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.description: Shows how to insert pages at the start of a PDF and shift existing bookmark destinations so they remain accurate using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text-outline.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to a Text Outline
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text-outline.description: Demonstrates how to extract hierarchical bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write them to a plain‑text file with indentation that reflects the bookmark hierarchy.

import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.title: Import OFD Bookmarks into PDF
import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an OFD file, converting its outline items to Aspose.Pdf.Bookmark objects, and adding them to a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-javascript-bookmark.title: Create JavaScript Bookmark in PDF
create-javascript-bookmark.description: Shows how to add a bookmark that executes JavaScript code when clicked using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.title: Batch Delete Bookmarks from Encrypted PDFs
batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.description: Shows how to open password‑protected PDF files, remove all bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the cleaned PDFs to a specified output folder.

rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.title: Rename PDF Bookmarks Using a Translation Dictionary
rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.description: Shows how to rename PDF bookmarks by applying a case‑insensitive translation map with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then saving the updated document.

validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.title: Validate PDF Bookmarks Against Generated TOC
validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.description: Extracts PDF bookmarks, builds a simple table of contents using font‑size heuristics, and compares the bookmark page numbers with the TOC entries to detect mismatches.

create-image-bookmarks-in-pdf.title: Create Image Bookmarks in PDF
create-image-bookmarks-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add a bookmark for each image found in a PDF, linking the bookmark to the page that contains the image using Aspose.Pdf.

set-bookmark-zoom-to-150-percent.title: Set Bookmark Zoom to 150% in PDF
set-bookmark-zoom-to-150-percent.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract its bookmarks, recursively set each bookmark's PageDisplay_Zoom to 150%, and save the modified document.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-excel.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Excel
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-excel.description: Extracts all bookmarks from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor, traverses the bookmark hierarchy, and writes the title, level, and destination page to a CSV file that can be opened in Excel.

import-bookmarks-from-csv.title: Import Bookmarks from CSV into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, build a hierarchical bookmark tree, and add the bookmarks to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

create-bookmark-to-named-destination.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
create-bookmark-to-named-destination.description: Shows how to define a named destination in a PDF and add a bookmark that references it using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-duplicate-bookmarks.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF
remove-duplicate-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, identify and remove duplicates based on title and page number, and then re‑add only the unique bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add "Reviewed" Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and append a "Reviewed" bookmark on the last page of each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add Colored Bookmarks to PDF Sections
add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create PDF bookmarks with different colors (red for warnings, green for informational sections) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.description: Demonstrates extracting the bookmark hierarchy from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flattening it while preserving level information, and writing the data to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

import-bookmarks-from-database.title: Import Bookmarks from Database into a PDF
import-bookmarks-from-database.description: Demonstrates how to read bookmark data from a database‑like result set and add each entry as a PDF bookmark using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.
